response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:02: Shiranui Flare performs the first song. Identified as 'Oboro' (オボロ) via on-screen intro text. Lyrics were manually transcribed from the video. 2. 01:03-02:17: Shiranui Flare performs the second song. Identified as 'Harmonia' (ハルモニア) via on-screen intro text. Lyrics were manually transcribed from the video. 3. 02:18-end: Talk segment with the audience and guest character 'Wakk-san'.
response.global_summary: A video of Shiranui Flare performing two songs, 'Oboro' and 'Harmonia', during her 2026 birthday festival, followed by a talk segment with a character named 'Wakk-san'.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare performs the song 'Oboro' (オボロ) on stage. Lyrics are shown on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
始まりと終わりのように
記憶を辿れば繋がる
（混ざり合う音の感情）
記憶を辿れば繋がる

変幻自在に 組み立てた想像のパズルは
狂おしいほど美しいのだろう
世界を飛び立つその瞬間
どうしても見せたくて
ごらんよ 見慣れない風景に
そうさ今 駆け出した
未来が不安だった昨日は
ちっぽけな 何気ない今日なのさ
幻が歪んだボクらの世界が
重なる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like a beginning and an end, if you trace the memories, they connect.
(The emotions of the sounds blending together)
If you trace the memories, they connect.

The puzzle of imagination assembled freely and changeably
Must be beautiful to the point of madness.
That moment when you take off into the world,
I wanted to show you no matter what.
Look, at the unfamiliar scenery,
That's right, now, I started running.
Yesterday, when the future was uncertain,
Is just a tiny, casual today.
Our world, where the illusion is distorted,
Overlaps.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare performs the song 'Harmonia' (ハルモニア) on stage. Lyrics are shown on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
本当はずっと 世界はボクを待ってた
本当はずっと ボクも君を待っていたんだ
重なり合った声が遠く響いて届く
聞こえるでしょう
目をあけて 物語が始まる時さ
世界が輝くその瞬間
ちょっとでも触れたくて
ごらんよ 幻をのぞいて
空間を飛び越した
未来を追い越すその瞬間
いつでも こんなものなのさ
幻をのぞいたボクらの世界が
溶け合う
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The truth is, the world had been waiting for me all along.
The truth is, I had been waiting for you all along, too.
The voices that overlapped resonate and reach far away.
You can hear it, right?
Open your eyes, it's time for the story to begin.
That moment when the world shines,
I wanted to touch it even just a little.
Look, peek through the illusion,
And jumped across space.
That moment when you overtake the future,
It's always just like this.
Our world, where we peeked through the illusion,
Melts together.

scenes.description: Flare speaks with the audience and introduces 'Wakk-san'.
